arts.ttl: Barcelona draw up January plan to fix huge issue
arts.sum: Barcelona will not sign anyone in January in order to be able to register summer signing Dani Olmo for the second half of the season, according to Spanish media. It was a massive outlay for a club that has had to pinch pennies recently and it unsurprisingly required massive squad manoeuvering to be able to register all the necessary players with LaLiga.

arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid and Barcelona Aren't Playing the Copa del Rey 2024-25 Second Round
arts.sum: Real Madrid, Barcelona, Athletic Club and Mallorca automatically advanced to the Copa del Rey round of 32.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona name squad for Mallorca clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this afternoon unveiled the club’s matchday squad for their upcoming meeting with RCD Mallorca. Hansi Flick’s troops are of course primed to return to action…

Peña; Kounde, Cubarsi, Iñigo, Balde; Casadó, Gavi; Yamal, Olmo, Raphinha; Lewandowski The Blaugrana return to La Liga action with a monster away game against Mallorca, and Hansi Flick has called up the following 23 players for Tuesday’s clash:

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona set surprisingly low Frenkie de Jong asking price
arts.sum: Barcelona could accept a surprisingly low offer for midfielder Frenkie de Jong, whose turbulent 2024 has seen him go from crucial leader to surplus to requirements in a matter of months.
